FOR PLAINTIFF EMERALD GILBERT; JAMES WAGER-SMITH, ESQ. FOR DEFENDANT YULY VILDERMAN, D.D.S.; ALEXANDRA PAPLOS, ESQ, FOR DEFENDANT YELIZAVETA O. LUCHKOVSKA, D.D.S. HEARING HELD. THE COURT DID NOT RECEIVE COURTESY COPIES OF DEFENDANT YULY VILDERMAN, D.D.S.' MOVING PAPERS PER LOCAL RULE 2.7(B) AND REQUIRED DEFENDANT'S COUNSEL TO PAY A $60 MOTION FILING FEE VIA E-FILING IN LIEU OF FILING A NEW MOTION. THE COURT GRANTED THE MOTION. THE TRIAL DATE OF 01/17/23 IS CONTINUED TO 05/10/23 IN DEPT. 206 AT 9:30 AM PER STIPULATION. ALL DISCOVERY TO TRACK THE NEW TRIAL DATE. PARTIES WAIVED NOTICE OF THE NEW TRIAL DATE. MR. WAGER-SMITH TO PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER THAT CONFORMS WITH THE COURT'S RULING, APPROVED AS TO FORM AND SUBMIT TO THE COURT. UPON APPROVAL & FILING OF THE ORDER, MR. WAGER-SMITH TO SERVE ORDER.
